title: SimpleClaimSystem
description: Full claim system for Minecraft servers. Fully configurable and many plugins supported.
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae8a32d39626b71e7d74c7566b82414fda8c3309.png)

![paid1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae942aa213697b48ebba25d31f94824f4d09aa87.png)
![paid2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/10ada5cfe7c1f388ba83f7d7ceacae9bdcbd27aa.png)
![paid3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/95918df96fae80aa9d34aa1220130ea173591eca.png)

SimpleClaimSystem V2 (paid version) : [https://builtbybit.com/resources/simpleclaimsystem-v2.92437/](https://builtbybit.com/resources/simpleclaimsystem-v2.92437/)

Discord : [[Click here]](https://discord.com/invite/6sRTGprM95)
Documentation : [[Click here]](https://celestis.dev/plugins/simpleclaimsystem/wiki/getting-started)

**SimpleClaimSystem** is a plugin allowing you to protect some chunks. The plugin is fully configurable! Check the config list just below to see the features!

- **Fully configurable** ⚙️
- **Folia supported** ⚡

![features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a5b6a5a0f4f1b92e34e5ee5f5baa4160dc496b78.png)

- Protect chunks (claim/unclaim) ✔
- Add/remove chunks to/from your claim ✔
- Add/remove players to/from your claim ✔
- Ban/unban players from your claim ✔
- Kick players from your claim ✔
- Merge claims ✔
- Manage your claim settings ✔
- Transfer ownership of your claim to someone ✔
- Teleport to your claim ✔
- Change the teleportation spawn of your claim ✔
- Change the name of your claim ✔
- Change the description of your claim ✔
- Sell/buy claims ✔
- See the borders of the claim with particles ✔
- Claim fly ✔
- Map of claims ✔
- Auto-map ✔
- Auto-claim ✔
- Auto-fly ✔
- Claim private chat ✔
- GUI for your claims list ✔
- GUI for all claims list ✔
- GUI for your claims settings ✔
- GUI to manage members ✔
- GUI to manage bans ✔
- GUI to manage chunks ✔
- Bedrock GUIs ✔
- ADMIN GUIs to manage ALL (not bedrock guis) ✔
- Import from GriefPrevention ✔

**Available claim settings (for protection)** : Build protection, Destroy protection, Use buttons, Use items (configurable in config.yml), Interact with blocks (configurable in config.yml), Use levers, Use pressure plates, Open doors, Open trap doors, Open fence gates, Trigger tripwires, Use repeaters/comparators, Use bells, Interact with entities (configurable in config.yml), Explosions (of any type: tnt, mobs, etc), Liquids (if external liquids can flow into the claim), Redstone (if external redstone can influence the claim), Frost walker, Fire spread, Teleportations, Entity damage, Enter (if players can enter physically into the claim), GuiTeleport (if players can teleport to your claims via /claims), Use portals, Pickup items, Drop items, PvP, Monsters (disable spawning of monsters), Weather (disable raining/snowing/thundering), Fly (if players can use claim fly), Elytra, Special blocks (check the documentation for more informations), Windcharges.

- **PlaceholderAPI support** ✅
- **WorldGuard support** ✅
- **Vault support** ✅
- **Dynmap support** ✅
- **Bluemap support** ✅
- **Pl3xmap support** ✅
- **GriefPrevention support** ✅
- **ItemsAdder support** ✅

![Settings](http://www.image-heberg.fr/files/1725665522205502115.gif)
![Enter](http://www.image-heberg.fr/files/17256655533130443880.gif)
![Explosions](http://www.image-heberg.fr/files/17256655802549800028.gif)
